title: Dutch-Style Bean Stew
description: A hearty and comforting bean stew made with dried white beans, inspired by Dutch cuisine.
instructions: Heat the Dutch Vegetable Oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the dried white beans, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add enough water to cover the beans and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 hour, or until the beans are tender.
Add the sugar, if using, and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
